title: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses * Women - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Ex-Offender Halfway Houses * Women 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Women Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SPONSORS INC DOWNTOWN CAMPUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing and supportive services for individuals released in Lane County from Oregon State Prison or the local jail who are currently on correctional supervision. The average length of the program is 90 to 120 days. Services include case management, behavioral health support, drug and alcohol treatment, and assistance with clothing, identification, bus passes or bicycles, employment search, and finding long-term housing. 338 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female, released from Oregon State Prison or Lane County Jail, and under supervision in Lane County. Participants must follow program rules, remain clean and sober (verified by urinalysis and breathalyzer testing), obtain full-time employment or enroll in school full-time, and comply with all conditions of their supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 485-8341 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPONSORS INC DOWNTOWN CAMPUS
